body: closes #140 and closes #148 - Instead of reworking the schedules, this PR adds documentation about the potential pitfalls about using the schedules. The same instance of a schedule should not be used for multiple callbacks, because the schedules are stateful. Also, `date_last` and `t_last` should be set appropriately for `EveryCalendarDtSchedule` and `EveryDtSchedule` for restarts.
title: Add docs about potential pitfalls with schedules

body:
This PR refactors

1. Getting the start date from the simulation,
2. Appending temporal values to the NetCDF file,
3. Initializing the NetCDF variable,

to separate functions. This is for preparing for the PR for writing data in pressure coordinates.

## TODO

- [x] Write tests for all the functions
title: Refactor functionality in `write_field!` for `NetCDFWriter` to other functions
